nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, dramatic contrast, black and white face split vertically, left side dark textured organic horror, right side smooth ethereal white, close-up portrait of a woman's face, first frame: right eye glowing pure white light, lips closed, second frame: left eye transforms from dark void into a luminous golden-yellow orb with intense glow, no pupil, no iris, just a solid radiant sphere, lips parting into a subtle, serene smile revealing upper teeth, seamless morphing transition, surreal, haunting, hyperrealistic skin texture, intricate details, artstation, concept art, white hair flowing gently as if caught in a soft breeze, subtle motion in strands, wind-swept locks, delicate movement, dynamic yet serene, emotional expression shift from neutral to gentle smile

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts, deformed, extra limbs, disfigured, text, signature, watermark, cartoon, anime, 3D render, plastic, doll-like, ugly, duplicate, mutation, grainy, noisy, overexposed, underexposed, flat lighting, boring, simple background, stiff hair, static hair, frozen motion, chaotic movement, messy strands, exaggerated grin, grimace, frown, unnatural smile, parted lips without teeth, closed eyes, blinking, head turn, full mouth open

nodes.title: Video Size
widgets_values:
By default, we set the image to a smaller size, 832x1216|1248px, for users with low VRAM. 
If you have enough VRAM, 24GB, you can change the size to 1024x1536px.

nodes.title: VRAM Usage and about 4 Steps LoRA
widgets_values:
## GPU:RTX4090D 24GB

| Model            | Size |VRAM Usage | 1st Generation | 2nd Generation |
|---------------------|-------|-----------|---------------|-----------------|
| fp8_scaled               |640*640| 84%               | ≈  536s              | ≈ 513s                   |
| fp8_scaled +  4steps LoRA  | 640*640  | 89%                | ≈ 108s               | ≈ 71s                   |

Using the Wan2.2 Lighting LoRA will result in the loss of video dynamics, but it will significantly reduce the creation time.
